titleStmt.title: SII 40.370: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 370. (A.R. No. 184 of 1934.) Darsi, Darsi Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up on the bund of a dried-up tank called Achchana-cheruvu (east of the village).
This is dated Śaka 1317, Rākshasa, Māgha, śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to 1396 A.D., January 24. However the cyclic year was Yuva.

Records the construction of a tank by Annadēva, in the name of his mother Āryamadēvi. Further it gives at length of the genealogy of Goṅkarāju of Nāgavaṁśa. Records the gift of agrahāra in Pina Pāntaḍa in the presence of Mahājanas to Gurudēva by Aśna Dēvarāju, for the merit of his ancestors.

Second portion of the record refers to the gift of 100 kunṭas of land by Aśna Dēvarāju to Gurudēva and construction of a tank called Pāpirāvigunṭa in memory of his son Nūka-rāju. Further it records the construction of a temple Pratāpa Gōpīnātha of Darsi and construction of a tank in the name of his mother Lakshyama Dēvi and also gift of 20 puṭṭis of land to the temple for conducting services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1317 yegunēṁṭi
rākṣasa saṁvaccara māgha śu 15 gu . nāṁḍu
svasti śrīmnamaṁḍalēsvara Annadēvamahā
rājulu śukhasaṁkhadhāvinōdaṁbunaṁ bri
divirājyaṁbu sēyucuṁḍi tamatalli Ārya
madēvulapēranu Ācaṁdrā¨rkamugānu ce
ṟuvu gaṭṭiṁcci . svasti Anēka kari makara nikara pa
rihita parita bhūtalādhipalakṣmī samāri(li)
ṁgitōttuṁga viśāla vakṣasthala saṁdhyādēvila
sādhaka kāmasāmrājya bhūri bhārajagati lali
tabhūdharabhāra jagativallabhamahanṛ patipu paramasvara
paramabhaṭṭāraka Anēka samarasaṁkhaṭṭanavīra vijayala
kṣmīlakṣita sahasrakiraṇanikara paṇēṁdrakula sa
ṁbhava karimagarōragavarāhalāṁcena narasiṁhmarā
macakrāyudha caturadhivēlāvalayalaita
Ayōdhya siṁhāsanamaṇimaguṭalalāṭa pa
ṭṭiva¨rdhana śataśatayōjanagaṁgā salilātyā
saviśadaṣavittikṛta maṇi ghātraka jātaka
¨rnadaṁḍadhavaḷaścatratraya yuraga pūṣaṇa
yuta caṁdralāṁcena viṣṇuvaṁśōdbhavanuṁgā
ceṁdrānvayakulatilaka hārītagōtra Ajātaga
rbha rakṣaṇaṁ Aśritajana kalpavṛkṣa śaraṇā
gatarakṣaka mahānadi taṭṭa ni¨rghghāta pū
rva paścima śailātala staṁbha viṣṇuku

maṁḍana tribhuvana kaṭhāturāya sidhu gōviṁda śita
karadaṁḍi tārikabhīmabhōgāvati vilaṁbānva¨rga matya
dbhutāṁta tribuvanakuladhīra ( bātkaṁbulāku Ātā
rakīmaṁḍali kāṁcōṁbulāra ) baramaṁḍalacuṟakā
ra vubhayadaḷa pūjaliṁganaṁ Ōṁ nārāyaṇa nāgavaṁśō
dbhava mūmmaṇilagaṁḍabhṛtti munivvara gaṁḍa satyaratnākara Āha
vā¨rjuna cekrava¨rti ( Apōdati sahasranōdaśakīradyōtkulā
jināṁ ) Anaṁtamu pādaśaṁkhātaṁ yatsatemādhamayā
yyana saṁtānaṁ gōṁkarāju Atani koḍku manabalidēvarāju Ā
tani koḍku nāgarāju Atani koḍku pōtarāju Atani koḍuku
vemulamali dēvarāju Āyana koḍku nūṁkarāju Ā
yana koḍku Āsnadēvarāju Āyanakoḍuku nūṁkarāju Āta
ni koḍuku Ōbaḷayya vīriki puṇyaṁgānu daraśi Annadēvarāju
yiccina Agrahārālu pinapāṁtaḍa gurudēvaraku
yistimi pedapāṁtaḍa tama tātalaku puṇyamugānu ciṟuma
naṁ goṁḍabayyarāju nāraparāju . maṁtri rāju vīru
sahitamaṁduna mahajanālakunistimi . daraśi beṁda
lūri saṁdukaṭṭuna tana koḍku nūṁkarāju paranuti
yanaku puṇyamugānu śiddhavarapu kalapamalāya śi
ṁgarāju jakkapeddigaṁgu maṁtrirāju vīru sahitamuna
mahājanulaku Agrahāramu yistimi . rākaṭadariśi
polamulōnu koṁta cenu vāpi rāvikuṁṭa ceṟuvu
kaṭṭiṁcci nūruguṁṭalavārki puṇyamugānu gurudēva
raku Agrahāramu Istimi . taṁgeḍavaṁca ciṟumana
ṁgoṁḍasaṁdukaḍu sāmu peṟu UUli polamu grā
magā samuciṟumanagoṁḍa mahājanālaku ni
stimi pūri miṭṭayidarasaṁdu kaṭṭunayidaṟapā
lamu goṁta meṭṭamanva malidēvarāju munmuṁḍu
malaḍuvēmula malidēvarāju pēranu paṁda
rāju Agrahāramu yistimi yī dara ceruvu kriṁda
gōraṁṭala cenu pūrimiṭa saṁdukaṭuna nālgu gōṟulu

tana bhūmi yicci
na vritti cenu yipuḍu
sthalamu Ammi
muṁdaṭi tōṭa
¨rmulu cilukūri A
namarāju maṁtarā
junuṁdāyā vīra
yakunu yistimi
darasidēvaravu sa
ṁdu kaṭṭina Asnadēva
rājulaperanu tanaku
ṁ buṇyaṁbugānu
celinūṁtu Alikha
rājumaṁtrirāju
Agrahāramu yisti
mi tama mātāpitā
lakuṁ buṇyaṁbugānu
daraśi pratāpa gōpinā
tani guḍikaṭṭiṁci tama ta
lli lakṣyamadēvula pēra
nu ceruvu gaṭṭiṁci sta
ṁbhamu vēyistimi yī
guḍigaṭṭina vōjula bō
juri vājukuṁbeṭṭina
ṭṭadi darasi Uttarānanu
kha 20 ru Uracēnu yistimi
svadattādviguṇa
ṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁbhavēt . yidattaḍi
bāpinavāru pa
ṁcamahāpātakaṁ
pratāpagōpinātani A
jñavara paradhuramuvu nā kha 1
Āśritulu
Digital edition of SII 40.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
